args.task:
Perform comprehensive subdomain enumeration and validation for the target domain scaa.us.
Use passive techniques (crt.sh, public DNS records) and active enumeration (subfinder, DNS bruteforce).
Validate discovered hosts with httpx (HTTP/HTTPS probing) to capture status codes, titles, and response sizes.
Identify potential subdomain takeover candidates and record any interesting headers, redirects, or exposed services.
Produce a consolidated output: list of subdomains, resolved IPs, HTTP status/title, takeover-risk flag, and recommended next steps for port/service discovery and crawling.

result.message: Agent 'Subdomain Enumeration Agent' created and started asynchronously

args.task:
Perform port and service discovery for scaa.us and all subdomains discovered by the Subdomain Enumeration Agent.
Use naabu for fast wide-port discovery, then run targeted nmap service/version detection (-sV, -sC) and TLS/HTTP analysis on discovered hosts.
Identify open ports, service banners, HTTP(S) virtual hosts, redirects, and any exposed admin/web interfaces (phpMyAdmin, Jenkins, Kibana, etc.).
Produce structured output: host, resolved IP(s), open ports, service & version, banner snippets, TLS details, evidence of admin consoles, and recommended next steps for deeper enumeration.
